player_notes.luka doncic: Exited Thursday's game early with a strained left hamstring; MRI pending. Status for upcoming games is uncertain — avoid props until MRI results and availability confirmed.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Sat out Thursday vs. Clippers with right ankle injury management (rest). Monitor availability for tonight's game vs. Denver; if active, no restrictions implied.
player_notes.anthony edwards: Ruled out vs. Pistons on Thursday; ineligible for NBA awards due to games-played minimum. Ongoing availability concern — confirm active status before targeting props.
player_notes.cade cunningham: Out at least another week with a collapsed lung. Do not target props; boosts usage for Detroit teammates (Duren, Jenkins).
player_notes.kon knueppel: Set Hornets franchise record for 3-pointers in a season (20 pts, multiple 3s Thursday). In strong form heading into tonight's game vs. Indiana — positive lean on 3PM props.

game_notes.LAL vs OKC: Luka Doncic (hamstring) exited Thursday's game; if ruled out for upcoming Lakers games, significant role/usage shifts for remaining Lakers players.
game_notes.SAS vs DEN: Wembanyama sat Thursday (ankle management); confirm active status before the Spurs-Nuggets game — his availability is the key prop driver for this matchup.
game_notes.DET vs MIN: Cade Cunningham (collapsed lung) remains out; Daniss Jenkins and Jalen Duren saw elevated usage (26 pts and 22 pts/14 reb respectively) — positive lean on their props if Cunningham remains out.
